description: The SAP S/4HANA Sales connector provides APIs that enable seamless integration with the [Sales Quotation (A2X) API v1.0.0](https://api.sap.com/api/API_SALES_QUOTATION_SRV/overview). The service allows to create, read, update, and delete sales quotation.
key-features: Create, read, update, and delete sales quotations in SAP S/4HANA
Seamless integration with the Sales Quotation (A2X) API v1.0.0
Support for basic and OAuth 2.0 authentication
Full CRUD operations for sales quotation management
